headline: Become a Vital Part of the Beale Street Theater!
short_description: Leave a lasting legacy with a personalized brass plaque on your chosen seat.
full_description: For a tax-deductible donation of $1,000, a personalized engraved brass plaque will be attached to the seat of your choice (subject to availability). Seat naming rights will remain in effect for the next 10 years. Each personalized nameplate includes space for 2 lines. You can choose to display your own name or honor someone special. You can dedicate a seat as an individual, in memory of a loved one, or with the name of your business.
benefits: 10-year seat naming rights, Personalized brass plaque (2 lines), Tax-deductible donation
seo_title: Adopt-A-Seat Program | Support Beale Street Theater Kingman
seo_description: Leave a lasting legacy at Beale Street Theater. $1,000 tax-deductible donation gets you a personalized brass plaque on your chosen seat for 10 years.

headline: Making Live Theater Accessible to All
short_description: Donate unused tickets to make live theater accessible to underserved youth and families.
full_description: The Pay-It-Forward Ticket Donation Program at Beale Street Theater allows you to donate unused tickets, making live theater accessible to underserved youth and families. By donating tickets, you will share the joy of live performances with those who might not otherwise have the chance to attend. You or your business can get involved by purchasing tickets to benefit local families. Businesses that support the arts provide a community impact and enjoy potential tax benefits. If you need to donate unused tickets, contact the theater to arrange for ticket donations.
benefits: Tax benefits, Community impact, Support underserved families, Business recognition
seo_title: Pay It Forward Tickets | Donate Theater Tickets Kingman AZ
seo_description: Donate unused tickets to help underserved youth and families experience live theater. Support the Pay-It-Forward program at Beale Street Theater.

headline: Fund the Audio/Visual Equipment
short_description: Help us deliver high-quality productions our community deserves.
full_description: Beale Street Theater is almost ready to shine! We're fundraising for the professional Audio/Visual equipment needed to deliver high-quality productions that our community deserves. Every microphone, spotlight, and projector helps bring stories to life. To give you the best experience possible here at Beale Street Theater, we need your support to acquire professional-grade equipment.
benefits: Tax-deductible donation, Recognition in programs, Support professional productions
seo_title: Audio Visual Equipment Fund | Support Beale Street Theater Kingman
seo_description: Help fund professional audio/visual equipment for Beale Street Theater. Every donation helps bring high-quality productions to Kingman. Tax-deductible.

headline: Support a Production - Basic Level
short_description: Entry-level sponsorship with logo placement and tickets.
full_description: A show sponsorship is an investment that makes an impact on the arts right here in our community. Each production is a large undertaking, and your sponsorship will support our programming including: royalties, sheet music, scripts, musicians, designers, technicians, lighting, sound, costumes, makeup and hair, and advertising costs.
benefits: Logo on posters, Social media post, 2 complimentary tickets
seo_title: Basic Show Sponsorship $100 | Sponsor Beale Street Theater
seo_description: Sponsor a show for $100. Includes logo on posters, social media post, and 2 tickets. Support community theater in Kingman, Arizona.

short_description: Mid-tier sponsorship with enhanced recognition and benefits.
full_description: Production Sponsors are recognized in the program, invited to the Opening Night reception, and have the opportunity to attend rehearsals for a sneak peak. benefits: Logo on posters, Social media post, Shout out from stage, 8 complimentary tickets, Opening night invitation
seo_title: Leading Show Sponsorship $500 | Sponsor Beale Street Theater
seo_description: Sponsor a show for $500. Logo placement, social media, stage shout out, 8 tickets, opening night invitation. Support Kingman theater.

headline: Become Part of a Creative Community
short_description: Join our volunteer team backstage, front-of-house, or in production.
full_description: Step into the enchanting world of storytelling and performance by volunteering with Beale Street Theater. This community-driven theater is committed to bringing captivating productions to life, and your involvement can make a significant difference. As a volunteer with Beale Street Theater, you might find yourself working backstage, assisting with set design, or helping with front-of-house operations during performances. The magic of theater extends beyond the stage, and your dedication can enhance the overall experience for both the audience and the talented performers. Volunteer roles at KCA are as diverse as the art forms it supports. From assisting with art exhibitions to organizing community events, your contributions can help ignite the spark of creativity in individuals of all ages.
benefits: Behind-the-scenes access, Skills development, Community connections, Event invitations, Experience credit
seo_title: Volunteer Opportunities | Beale Street Theater Kingman AZ
seo_description: Volunteer with Beale Street Theater. Backstage, front-of-house, set design opportunities. Join our creative community in downtown Kingman.

headline: Step Into The Spotlight
short_description: Audition for community and youth theater productions at Beale Street Theater.
full_description: We welcome performers of all experience levels to audition for our diverse productions. Youth Auditions Policy: No preparation or prior experience required. Eligibility: Open to aspiring performers ages 12-18. Information: Dates are posted on the Kingman Center for the Arts website and our official social media channels. Prepare For Auditions With Matt - Check out video tutorials on selecting monologues and audition preparation.
benefits: Performance experience, Skills development, Professional-grade venue, Community theater credit, Youth programs available
seo_title: Auditions | Community & Youth Theater Kingman AZ
seo_description: Audition for Beale Street Theater productions. Community theater and youth programs ages 12-18. No experience required. Kingman, Arizona.
